pass_context.rf06_definition: RF-06 flags: using money, child support, shared expenses, or financial arrangements as tools of control or punishment. Key indicators: withholding/threatening financial support; access contingent on financial compliance; financial disparity as leverage; refusing expenses as punishment; frivolous financial accounting demands; hiding assets/income; children's needs as financial leverage; threatening increased support as retaliation.

cross_rf_foundation.rf02_context: RF-02 complete (101 flags). Financial coercion often layers on top of gatekeeping — access conditional on financial compliance is both RF-02 and RF-06. Watch for financial conditions attached to visitation agreements.
cross_rf_foundation.rf05_context: RF-05 complete (26 flags, paper-tiger trajectory). Some threat signals may have financial components — legal threats about support, contempt threats with financial implications. 'Big contempt case' (Nov 25 2025, B-029) may have financial dimensions.
cross_rf_foundation.dataset_context: Divorce filed July 2021. Child support arrangement established ~late 2021/early 2022 (approximate per CP1 context). Dataset begins Jan 2022 — financial arrangement should be established by dataset start. 36 keyword hits, 86% received = Melissa is dominant financial coercion direction.
known_signal_areas: Phase A heavy (29/36 hits in Phase A): financial dynamics active throughout Phase A
Hot periods: 2024-08, 2024-06, 2023-09 — financial disputes concurrent with major conflict clusters
Aug 2024 mega-cluster (EP-0854, 311 msgs): possible financial component to this peak episode
Phase C continuation: 5 hits in Phase C (B-029-B-031 area)

anticipated_arcs: ARC-RF06-001: Financial Leverage Pattern — using money/support as control lever
not_this_boundaries: Requesting transparency required by court order
Genuine inability to pay vs. strategic withholding

calibration_episode.batch_tone: Cooperative baseline Jan-Oct 2022. Financial arrangement recently established post-divorce (filed July 2021). Expected period of financial adjustment — disputes possible but should be distinguishable from weaponization. No financial coercion anticipated in cooperative period.
calibration_episode.reason_not_flagged: Jan-Oct 2022 is the cooperative pre-escalation baseline. RF-06 triage Phase A dominant (29 hits) but concentrated in later Phase A. B-001 expected zero financial coercion signals — financial arrangement recently established, cooperative baseline confirmed. Confirming zero RF-06 primary flags for B-001. CP2 critical for establishing the financial arrangement context.

batch_summary.note: Jan-Oct 2022 calibration batch. Zero RF-06 primary flags. Cooperative baseline — no financial coercion in pre-escalation period. RF-06 signal expected in Phase A (later batches) and Phase B/C. Arc ARC-RF06-001 initialized at CANDIDATE. CP2 needed to establish financial arrangement context (child support structure, expense sharing agreements) before signal classification can proceed.

arc_updates.event: Financial Leverage arc initialized — B-001 baseline: no financial coercion in cooperative period; CP2 needed for financial arrangement context
